epigraph.quote: We keep pink Dolomite Mountains on our left. Fruit trees. V. fertile valley.

moments.quote: We arrived in Stallisfield again, the same as last year. The pub runs a casino in huts across the road.
Queues at Channel tunnel terminus. Irate English woman from Dutch car at foreign bus. The wait was long + stressful
A man is cooking on a blue gas bottle outside behind the cab, a flame right next to the gas tank.
lots of windy roads up a hill to St. Seveur. Finally we got there, only to find that it had been closed – Te Coop – for sale.
Jewish window, Goose poking gargoyle, choir carvings, central altar. Difficult lunch - making decisions in a foreign language.
It's well laid out with good clean showers. Art classes - arty things round campsite, Metal work, glass, poems! Lights in showers painted.
Late morning we pass thro Austria. Past Innsbruck. on to Bolsano. A long day's driving. We keep pink Dolomite Mountains on our left.
We try 4 different campsites, all full. They give us their fresh left-over bread for our supper.

images.caption: tr@ns:it areatransit.it sticker with campsite photo

moments.quote: The van only just scrapes thro. I was anxious 3 roads before the end. Simon only got anxious at the very end.

moments.place: Orta San Giulio, Lake Orta, Italy
moments.quote: Lake Orta is the smallest & least known, only 13K top to bottom. The village & surrounding hill sides are beautiful.

images.caption: Medieval fresco with figures on horseback

moments.quote: Fénis Castle had a St George Fresco + lovely stonework. There was a guided tour which we couldn't understand at all: 1) rapid Italian 2) local dialect 3) talking child who shd. have been removed.

images.caption: Panorama of the Alps, Mont Blanc, Giants Tooth (4014m) from Rute (Helbronner 3470m)

moments.quote: As we passed a chapel, the man read in Italian "Thanks be to God for Sister Water" & everyone roared with laughter.
Back at the van my hands hardly worked. Camera broken - wet in knapsack. I had to change every garment. Only Simon's shorts wet.
We have woken, in sunshine, to the most stupendous view of Mont Blanc. Sunshine on white.

images.caption: le Petit Coq, Plan d'Avoz, 74430 Saint-Jean d'Aulps

moments.quote: We are camping just down the road from her at __Baume__ municipal park (€10, instead of the €28 we've been paying recently.)
After lunch we set off to Taizé along the Voie Verte. It was a lovely ride, mostly in the shade.

images.caption: Churry Abbey spire visible from campsite
Capital from the choir of Cluny 3, the beekeeper

moments.quote: The pool was amazing, indoor & out. 4 lanes for swimming in a big pool, a flume, a water shoot, battle of bubbles.
We reached the village next to Montreid & camped at __Le Pigeon Blanc__ * * in the village below-
we passed by St. Gabriel & Cécile & walked along a huge sandy beach - Côte d'Opale
Why do northen French families damage campsites near Calais?
I did a bit of hand washing to get us back to England.
